item.title: Claude Opus 4.7 is available today on https://t.co/tHPAZRgiuP, the Claude Platform, and all major cl...
item.description:
Claude Opus 4.7 is available today on https://t.co/tHPAZRgiuP, the Claude Platform, and all major cloud platforms.
Read more: https://t.co/FXsCSDFSv3
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 38 | 🔁 7 | 💬 3 | 👁 1722
item.author: @claudeai

item.title: In Claude Code, the new /ultrareview command runs a dedicated review session that reads through your...
item.description:
In Claude Code, the new /ultrareview command runs a dedicated review session that reads through your changes and flags what a careful reviewer would catch.
We've also extended auto mode to Max users, so longer tasks run with fewer interruptions.
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 31 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 1705
item.author: @claudeai

item.title:
Introducing Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable Opus model yet.
It handles long-running tasks with mo...
item.description:
Introducing Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable Opus model yet.
It handles long-running tasks with more rigor, follows instructions more precisely, and verifies its own outputs before reporting back.
You can hand off your hardest work with less supervision. https://t.co/PtlRdpQcG5
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 460 | 🔁 102 | 💬 83 | 👁 3668
item.author: @claudeai

item.description:
RT @vista8: 张小珺最新一期《商业访谈录》中，李广密对海外AI模型公司的点评概要：
1. Anthropic：战略极专注的领跑者
果断放弃C端市场、多模态发展以及跟风推理模型。
集中全部资源“All in”在 Coding和 Agent等高价值任务上。
采用自…
--- @dotey | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 11 | 💬 0 | 👁 2
item.author: @dotey

item.title:
心理学家科胡特曾提过一个极其简洁的心理健康标准：自信和热情。
当一个人身上的活力能够滋养他自己，就是自信；
当这份活力能够滋养他人或事物，就是热情。
所以，能成事的人，首先需要具备人格上的这两种...
item.description:
心理学家科胡特曾提过一个极其简洁的心理健康标准：自信和热情。
当一个人身上的活力能够滋养他自己，就是自信；
当这份活力能够滋养他人或事物，就是热情。
所以，能成事的人，首先需要具备人格上的这两种底层能力。
自信，是一个内聚的自我。
它让你相信自己是有价值的，值得被爱，也值得成功。
热情，是向外流动的能量，让你对事物、对他人充满渴望和连接。
自信与热情，决定了你敢不敢出发，以及是否乐于出发。
—— 今天刷到武志红老师分享的一段话，觉得特别有力量
--- @stark_nico99 | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 97
item.author: @stark_nico99

item.title:
Qwen 3.6 is here, and open-source! Run it locally with improved agentic coding capabilities.
Try it...
item.description:
Qwen 3.6 is here, and open-source! Run it locally with improved agentic coding capabilities.
Try it with Claude Code: ollama launch claude --model qwen3.6
Try it with OpenClaw: ollama launch openclaw --model qwen3.6
Run it: ollama run qwen3.6
--- @ollama | ❤️ 102 | 🔁 13 | 💬 13 | 👁 4532
item.author: @ollama
